en: Scientists believe that around 50 million years ago Antarctica was warm, that it was covered in rainforest, and that many different kinds of animals lived there.
ja: 科学者たちは、約5000万年前の南極大陸は温暖で、熱帯雨林に覆われ、多くの異なる種類の動物がそこに生息していたと考えている。

questions.q: 英文 "Scientists believe that around 50 million years ago Antarctica was warm, that it was covered in rainforest, and that many different kinds of animals lived there." の内容の言い換えとして最も適切な英文はどれか。
questions.a: Scientists have thought for around 50 million years that Antarctica is a warm place with rainforests and many kinds of animals.
questions.b: According to scientists, Antarctica around 50 million years ago was a warm place with rainforests and many kinds of animals.
questions.c: Scientists say that Antarctica is now a warm place with rainforests and many kinds of animals living there.
questions.d: Scientists have proved that Antarctica became warm around 50 million years ago because rainforests and animals arrived there.
questions.explanation: "around 50 million years ago" は that 節の中にあり、「南極が温暖だった時期」を表す。a はこれを believe にかけて「5000万年前から考えている」と誤読した形、c は過去の話を現在の話と誤読した形。d は believe（考えている）を prove（証明した）にすり替え、原文にない因果関係まで加えている。

questions.q: "Scientists believe that around 50 million years ago Antarctica was warm" の "that" と同じ使い方をしている文はどれか。
questions.a: This is the most exciting movie that I have ever seen.
questions.b: Look at that tall building over there.
questions.c: The question was so difficult that nobody could answer it.
questions.d: Everyone knows that the earth goes around the sun.
questions.explanation: 原文の that は believe の目的語となる名詞節（〜ということ）を導く接続詞で、d の knows that ... と同じ働き。a は movie を修飾する関係代名詞、b は「あの」という指示形容詞、c は so ... that 構文（とても〜なので）で、いずれも節を動詞の目的語にする働きではない。

questions.q: この文は "Scientists believe that ..., that ..., and that ...." という形をしている。これと同じ構造を持つ文はどれか。
questions.a: I hope that the weather will be nice and that you will enjoy the trip.
questions.b: She bought a bag that was cheap and that had many pockets.
questions.c: The news that our team won the final game surprised everybody.
questions.d: He got up early so that he could catch the first train.
questions.explanation: 原文は1つの動詞 believe が「that+節」を3つ並べてまとめて目的語にした構造で、a も hope が2つの that 節（接続詞）を並べて目的語にしている。b は見た目がそっくりだが that は bag を修飾する関係代名詞なので構造が違う。c は The news の内容を説明する同格の that、d は so that（〜するために）で、どちらも動詞の目的語ではない。
